title: Hochzeitsreise zu dritt
writer: Gustav Holm, Ernst Marischka, Karl Meinhardt
actors: Brigitte Helm, Oskar Karlweis, Susi Lanner
plot: The new bride of a Viennese youth is so demanding about her career that she lets him go solo on the honeymoon so she can do an engagement.Left on his own, he finds an unpretentious young lady better suited to him.
